calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Banks, Appellant herein and Defendant below; Michael Cain, Respondent herein and Plaintiff below.

This matter comes on for trial de novo on appeal after small claims hearing. The hearing is not reported. Mr. Cain and Ms. Banks are placed under oath.

Ms. Banks commences presentation of Appellant's case.

Exhibit [unidentified] - Report from "Boomer" re: anti-graffiti sealer deficiencies review

Mr. Cain commences presentation of Appellee's case.

Exhibits [unidentified] - e-mails, text messages, invoices, checks for entire project.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Set For Trial On Apr-04-18 At 09:20 A.M. In Dept 306
